name: Lou Table Lamp - 15.25 Inch Height - TBL4591 - White/Nickel - Safavieh
description:
Introducing the elegant Lou Table Lamp, a sophisticated addition to any space that seeks to enhance its ambiance with a touch of class. The lamp boasts a striking white fabric shade paired beautifully with a sturdy marble base finished in a sleek nickel color. The blend of materials strikes a perfect balance between modern style and classic charm.

The Lou Table Lamp stands at an overall height of 15.25 inches, with the shade dimension stretching to 8.5/12.5 inches in height and 5 inches in width at the top. The base, crafted from exquisite marble, measures an exact 5 inches by 5 inches, giving it a substantial presence without overpowering your table or desk. A convenient 60-inch cord allows for flexible placement in your room, ensuring that this chic luminary can be enjoyed in a variety of settings.

Perfect for those who appreciate refined details and a minimalist approach to interior design, the Lou Table Lamp will illuminate your space with a warm, inviting glow. Whether you're looking to brighten a dim nook, add functionality to your office desk, or infuse your living room with a soft, diffused light, this lamp is poised to deliver both function and flair.

Invite the Lou Table Lamp to become a harmonious part of your home or office decor for a polished look that gracefully complements any interior.
